command: The Maestro app is open. On the LEFT side panel there is a list of agents. The first agent listed is 'Sakur radio'. Right-click specifically on that text in the LEFT SIDEBAR of Maestro (not in the menu bar, not in the chat area - in the sidebar on the far left of the Maestro window). A menu should appear with a Delete option. Click Delete.
description: Right-click Sakur radio in Maestro left sidebar
